title: Volkskool speel tennis teen Cradock
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"CRADOCK NUUS - Laer Volkskool (LVS) se tennisspanne het Maandag na Cradock vertrek om teen Laerskool Cradock tennis te speel.","html":"CRADOCK NUUS - Laer Volkskool (LVS) se tennisspanne het Maandag na Cradock vertrek om teen Laerskool Cradock tennis te speel."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Uitslae:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dogters 1ste span","html":"Dogters 1ste span"},{"type":"list","items":["Enkels 3 - 3","Dubbels 3 - 0","LVS wen 6 - 3"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Seuns 1ste span","html":"Seuns 1ste span"},{"type":"list","items":["Enkels 1 - 5","Dubbels 1 - 2","LVS verloor 2 - 7"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Seuns 2de span","html":"Seuns 2de span"},{"type":"list","items":["Enkels 3 - 3","Dubbels 3 - 0","LVS wen 6 - 3"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dankie aan die seuns van die 3de span wat ingestaan het.","html":"Dankie aan die seuns van die 3de span wat ingestaan het."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Laer Volkskool se 1ste en 2de tennisspanne.","html":"Laer Volkskool se 1ste en 2de tennisspanne."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’","html":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’"}]
